title: Dashboard
subtitle: Recent activity · Deep Research progress · Recommendations

gettingStarted.titleEmpty: Add one source and OpenCairn starts working.
gettingStarted.titleActive: Start today's workspace work from one place.
gettingStarted.descEmpty: Start with a file, link, or pasted text. OpenCairn will guide you toward a summary, suggested questions, and the first note.
gettingStarted.descActive: Recent documents and running work stay below. New sources and agent work can start here whenever you need them.

import.title: Import sources
import.desc: Bring Markdown, Drive, or Notion material into the workspace.

project.title: Create project
project.desc: Set up a focused area and organize notes by topic.

ask.title: Ask an agent
ask.desc: Ask across the workspace and turn context into the next agent tasks.

lists.noResearchTitle: No agent work is running yet
lists.noResearch: After adding sources, ask a workspace-scoped question or start with a first question now.
lists.noDocs: Import your first source to create searchable notes and a usable knowledge base.
